title: Color Mixer
description: Mix two colors at any ratio to generate a blended color. Copy the result as HEX or RGB. Free online color blending tool.

howToUse.label: Choose two colors
howToUse.description: Use the color picker or type a HEX code directly (e.g. #FF0000) for each of the two colors.

howToUse.label: Adjust the blend ratio
howToUse.description: Drag the slider to change the mix ratio between the two colors. Far left is 100% Color 1; far right is 100% Color 2.

howToUse.label: Copy the result
howToUse.description: Copy the blended color as HEX or RGB. The 5-step gradient preview shows intermediate steps at 0%, 25%, 50%, 75%, and 100%.

faq.question: How is the color mixing calculated?
faq.answer: For physically accurate results, the tool converts sRGB values to linear RGB (proportional to actual light energy), takes a weighted average, then converts back to sRGB. This gives more natural midpoints than simply averaging raw RGB byte values.

faq.question: Can I type a HEX code directly?
faq.answer: Yes. Type a 6-digit HEX code with a # prefix (e.g. #1D3D5E) into the text field. It syncs with the color picker in real time.

faq.question: Can I use this for CSS gradients?
faq.answer: The 5-step gradient preview shows blended colors at 0%, 25%, 50%, 75%, and 100%. For full CSS gradient code generation, try the CSS Gradient Generator tool.

faq.question: Does it support alpha / transparency mixing?
faq.answer: Currently only opaque RGB colors are supported. Alpha channel (transparency) blending is not available in this tool.
